name: anthril-claude-plugins
description: Official Anthril plugin marketplace — data analysis, knowledge engineering, business economics, brand management, PPC management, and developer tooling

plugins.name: data-analysis
plugins.description: 5 skills for data profiling, quality auditing, pipeline design, cohort analysis, and anomaly detection

plugins.name: knowledge-engineering
plugins.description: 4 skills for entity disambiguation, relationship mapping, knowledge graph building, and business data modelling

plugins.name: business-economics
plugins.description: 2 skills for unit economics calculation and market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM) estimation

plugins.name: npm-package-audit
plugins.description: Audit npm packages for publishing quality, cross-OS compatibility, types, security, and CI/CD

plugins.name: plan-completion-audit
plugins.description: Full-stack audit of project plans versus actual implementation with Supabase schema verification

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new Claude Code skills with proper frontmatter, directory structure, templates, and examples

plugins.name: brand-manager
plugins.description: 9 skills for end-to-end brand creation — identity, guidelines, audience, competitors, logo briefs, colour, design tokens, legal disclaimers, and website copy

plugins.name: software-development
plugins.description: 2 audit skills for software teams — dead code detection across 9 languages (JS/TS, Python, Go, Rust, Java, PHP, Ruby, C#) and end-to-end write path mapping with framework and database introspection

plugins.name: ppc-manager
plugins.description: 23 skills for end-to-end PPC — Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, and GTM — with OAuth-authenticated read/write across all four platforms via bundled Python MCP servers

plugins.name: database-design
plugins.description: Postgres schema audit for Supabase or any Postgres 13+ database — per-schema parallel review of tables, columns, relationships, constraints, triggers, RPC functions, indexes, RLS policies, and array/JSONB design with prioritised migration suggestions
